Metadata.title: Risking - Project Status
Metadata.description: Track the progress of the Risking digital adaptation and see what's coming next.

Lobby.waitingToStart: Wait for the host to start the game...
Lobby.needMorePlayers: Need at least 2 players to start.

Game.defendQuestion: How will you mitigate this risk?
Game.defendInstructions: Click on a <bold>Mitigation Card</bold> in your hand below, or accept the penalty.
Game.stepSelectRisk: Select a Risk Card from your hand
Game.stepSelectTarget: Select a Target from the panel
Game.reasonHostEnded: Reason: The host ended the game prematurely.
Game.reasonNoPlayers: Reason: All players left the game.
Game.reasonRoundsEnded: Reason: The game reached the end of the 4 rounds.
Game.finalScoreboard: The game has ended. Check the scoreboard below:

Risks.risk_1: Unavailability of requirements documents for testing
Risks.risk_10: Deficiencies in components provided by external agents
Risks.risk_13: Inadequate actors developing a certain task
Risks.risk_15: Communication failures between analysts and developers
Risks.risk_16: Adopted technology is inadequate for a certain task
Risks.risk_17: Test environment does not replicate production
Risks.risk_19: Existing structure is inadequate for performing tasks
Risks.risk_21: Incompetent or overly competent actors for given technology

Mitigations.task: 1. Have a team representative at the client site. 2. Involve the testing team early in the project. 3. Hold requirement gathering workshops.
Mitigations.structure: 1. Detailed cost and schedule estimates from various sources. 2. Design according to cost. 3. Adopt Incremental development.
Mitigations.actor: 1. Team working by job matching. 2. Conduct cross-training. 3. Elaborate an adequate pre-schedule.
Mitigations.technology: 1. Elaborate comparative evaluation. 2. Conduct inspections. 3. Perform Compatibility analysis.
Mitigations.task_actor: 1. Train the development team. 2. Define tasks according to individual skills. 3. Adopt flexible governance.
Mitigations.task_technology: 1. Adopt contingency models. 2. Manage technology options. 3. Standardize infra with IaC.
Mitigations.structure_task: 1. Adapt decision structure. 2. Modify process model. 3. Define value-prioritized backlog.
Mitigations.actor_technology: 1. Prototype the product. 2. Conduct technical process analysis. 3. Use scenario techniques.
Mitigations.actor_structure: 1. Apply appropriate leadership tactics. 2. Hire cooperative people with management skills. 3. Adopt team building programs.
Mitigations.structure_technology: 1. Change authority or workflow. 2. Adopt/configure new organizational technologies. 3. Plan capacity with metrics.
